apps.label: Viscereality Preview
apps.description: Public placeholder target for the main Quest-side runtime.

apps.label: Viscereality Twin
apps.description: Twin-mode Quest runtime. On-device control is disabled; all parameters arrive via the companion LSL bridge.

apps.label: Viscereality LSL Relay
apps.description: Lightweight LSL relay that forwards Quest telemetry to the desktop companion for monitoring.

apps.label: Quest Browser
apps.description: Browser target used by the remote open-URL workflow.

bundles.label: Preview Stack
bundles.description: Ordered install bundle for the public preview workspace.

bundles.label: Twin Stack
bundles.description: Full twin-mode deployment: relay for telemetry, twin runtime for remote control.
